lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਆਪੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਸਚੀ ਦਰਗਹਿ ਜਾਣੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: jinaa aape guramukh de vaddiaaee se jan sachee darageh jaane |11|
lines.english: That Gurmukh, whom You have blessed with greatness - that humble being is known in Your True Court. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਰਦਾਨਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok maradaanaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, Mardaanaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਕਟੋਰੀ ਮੋਹਿ ਭਰੀ ਪੀਲਾਵਾ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: krodh kattoree mohi bharee peelaavaa ahankaar |
lines.english: Anger is the cup, filled with emotional attachment, and egotism is the server.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਕਲਵਾਲੀ ਕਾਮੁ ਮਦੁ ਮਨੂਆ ਪੀਵਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kal kalavaalee kaam mad manooaa peevanahaar |
lines.english: The Dark Age of Kali Yuga is the vessel, filled with the wine of sexual desire; the mind is the drunkard.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣੀ ਲਾਹਣਿ ਸਤੁ ਗੁੜੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਰਾ ਕਰਿ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: karanee laahan sat gurr sach saraa kar saar |
lines.english: So let good deeds be your distillery, and Truth your molasses; in this way, make the most excellent wine of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਜਲਸ ਕੂੜੇ ਲਬ ਕੀ ਪੀ ਪੀ ਹੋਇ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: majalas koorre lab kee pee pee hoe khuaar |
lines.english: Drinking too much in the company of falsehood and greed, one is ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਮੰਡੇ ਕਰਿ ਸੀਲੁ ਘਿਉ ਸਰਮੁ ਮਾਸੁ ਆਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gun mandde kar seel ghiau saram maas aahaar |
lines.english: Make virtue your bread, good conduct the ghee, and modesty the meat to eat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਖਾਧੈ ਜਾਹਿ ਬਿਕਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guramukh paaeeai naanakaa khaadhai jaeh bikaar |1|
lines.english: As Gurmukh, these are obtained, O Nanak; partaking of them, one's sins depart. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਦਾਨਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: maradaanaa 1 |
lines.english: Mardaanaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਲਾਹਣਿ ਆਪੁ ਮਦੁ ਮਜਲਸ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਧਾਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa laahan aap mad majalas trisanaa dhaat |
lines.english: The human body is the vat, self-conceit is the wine, and desire is the company of drinking buddies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਸਾ ਕਟੋਰੀ ਕੂੜਿ ਭਰੀ ਪੀਲਾਏ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: manasaa kattoree koorr bharee peelaae jamakaal |
lines.english: The cup of the mind's longing is overflowing with falsehood, and the Messenger of Death is the cup-bearer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੁ ਗੁੜੁ ਸਾਲਾਹ ਮੰਡੇ ਭਉ ਮਾਸੁ ਆਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: giaan gurr saalaah mandde bhau maas aahaar |
lines.english: So make spiritual wisdom your molasses, the Praise of God your bread, and the Fear of God the meat you eat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਤੁ ਮਦਿ ਪੀਤੈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਬਹੁਤੇ ਖਟੀਅਹਿ ਬਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: eit mad peetai naanakaa bahute khatteeeh bikaar |
lines.english: Drinking in this wine, O Nanak, one takes on countless sins and corruptions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਇਹੁ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਸਚੁ ਹੈ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak ihu bhojan sach hai sach naam aadhaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, this is the true food; let the True Name be your only Support. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਂਯਾਂ ਲਾਹਣਿ ਆਪੁ ਮਦੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਧਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: kaanyaan laahan aap mad amrit tis kee dhaar |
lines.english: If the human body is the vat, and self-realization is the wine, then a stream of Ambrosial Nectar is produced.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਿਉ ਮੇਲਾਪੁ ਹੋਇ ਲਿਵ ਕਟੋਰੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਭਰੀ ਪੀ ਪੀ ਕਟਹਿ ਬਿਕਾਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: satasangat siau melaap hoe liv kattoree amrit bharee pee pee katteh bikaar |3|
lines.english: Meeting with the Society of the Saints, the cup of the Lord's Love is filled with this Ambrosial Nectar; drinking it in, one's corruptions and sins are wiped away. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਗਣ ਗੰਧਰਬਾ ਆਪੇ ਖਟ ਦਰਸਨ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: aape sur nar gan gandharabaa aape khatt darasan kee baanee |
lines.english: He Himself is the angelic being, the heavenly herald, and the celestial singer. He Himself is the one who explains the six schools of philosophy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਿਵ ਸੰਕਰ ਮਹੇਸਾ ਆਪੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਕਥ ਕਹਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: aape siv sankar mahesaa aape guramukh akath kahaanee |
lines.english: He Himself is Shiva, Shankara and Mahaysh; He Himself is the Gurmukh, who speaks the Unspoken Speech.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੈ ਨਾਲਿ ਗੋਸਟਿ ਆਪਿ ਉਪਦੇਸੈ ਆਪੇ ਸੁਘੜੁ ਸਰੂਪੁ ਸਿਆਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: aapai naal gosatt aap upadesai aape sugharr saroop siaanee |
lines.english: He discusses with Himself, and He teaches Himself; He Himself is discrete, graceful and wise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜੋਗੀ ਆਪੇ ਭੋਗੀ ਆਪੇ ਸੰਨਿਆਸੀ ਫਿਰੈ ਬਿਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: aape jogee aape bhogee aape saniaasee firai bibaanee |
lines.english: He Himself is the Yogi, He Himself is the Sensual Enjoyer, and He Himself is the Sannyaasee, wandering through the wilderness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣਾ ਚੋਜੁ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੇ ਸਭਨਾ ਜੀਆ ਕਾ ਹੈ ਜਾਣੀ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: aapanaa choj kar vekhai aape aape sabhanaa jeea kaa hai jaanee |12|
lines.english: Staging His own play, He Himself watches it; He Himself is the Knower of all beings. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਊਪਜੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਜਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: har siau preet aoopajai maaeaa mohu jalaavai |
lines.english: Love for the Lord wells up within me, and my attachment to Maya is burnt away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹਾ ਸੰਧਿਆ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਚਿਤਿ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: ehaa sandhiaa paravaan hai jit har prabh meraa chit aavai |
lines.english: That evening prayer alone is acceptable, which brings the Lord God to my consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਮਰੈ ਮਨੂਆ ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਸੰਧਿਆ ਕਰੇ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee dubidhaa marai manooaa asathir sandhiaa kare veechaar |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, duality is conquered, and the mind becomes stable; I have made contemplative meditation my evening prayer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਧਿਆ ਕਰੈ ਮਨਮੁਖੀ ਜੀਉ ਨ ਟਿਕੈ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮੈ ਹੋਇ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sandhiaa karai manamukhee jeeo na ttikai mar jamai hoe khuaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the self-willed manmukh may recite his evening prayers, but his mind is not centered on it; through birth and death, he is ruined. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਕਰਤੀ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਫਿਰੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਪਿਆਸ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: priau priau karatee sabh jag firee meree piaas na jaae |
lines.english: I wandered over the whole world, crying out, "Love, O Love!", but my thirst was not quenched.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਮੇਰੀ ਪਿਆਸ ਗਈ ਪਿਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਘਰਿ ਆਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur miliai meree piaas gee pir paaeaa ghar aae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, meeting the True Guru, my desires are satisfied; I found my Beloved, when I returned to my own home. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦਸ ਅਠ ਵਰਨ ਉਪਾਇਅਨੁ ਆਪਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਆਪਿ ਰਾਜੁ ਲਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape das atth varan upaaeian aap braham aap raaj leaa |
lines.english: He Himself created the people of the eighteen castes; God Himself acquired His domain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਤੰਤੁ ਪਰਮ ਤੰਤੁ ਸਭੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੇ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਦਾਸੁ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape tant param tant sabh aape aape tthaakur daas bheaa |
lines.english: He Himself is the supreme essence, He Himself is the essence of all. He Himself is the Lord and Master, and He Himself is the servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਅਭੁਲੁ ਨ ਭੁਲੈ ਕਬ ਹੀ ਸਭੁ ਸਚੁ ਤਪਾਵਸੁ ਸਚੁ ਥਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aap abhul na bhulai kab hee sabh sach tapaavas sach thiaa |
lines.english: - He never errs; the justice of the True Lord is totally True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮਾਰੇ ਆਪੇ ਛੋਡੈ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸੇ ਕਰੇ ਦਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape maare aape chhoddai aape bakhase kare deaa |
lines.english: He Himself kills, and He Himself redeems; He Himself, in His Kindness, forgives us. He is infallible

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜਿਨਾ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤਿਨ ਅੰਦਰਹੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਰਮੁ ਗਇਆ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: aape jinaa bujhaae guramukh tin andarahu doojaa bharam geaa |13|
lines.english: Those whom the Lord Himself instructs as Gurmukh - duality and doubt depart from within them. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਤੀ ਤਿਸੈ ਨ ਜਾਣਈ ਨਾਨਕ ਫਿਟੁ ਅਲੂਣੀ ਦੇਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jin keetee tisai na jaanee naanak fitt aloonee deh |1|
lines.english: Cursed and insipid is that body, O Nanak, which does not know the One who created it. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਸਿਮਰਹਿ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਤੈ ਤਨਿ ਉਡੈ ਖੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: har naam na simareh saadhasang tai tan uddai kheh |
lines.english: That body, which does not remember the Lord's Name in meditation in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, shall be reduced to dust.
